description: Read-only Peloton workout, class, and structural-provider facts in a private local store.

auth_env_var_specs.name: PELOTON_OAUTH_USERNAME
auth_env_var_specs.description: Private bootstrap username supplied by the caller's credential wrapper.

auth_env_var_specs.name: PELOTON_OAUTH_PASSWORD
auth_env_var_specs.description: Private bootstrap password supplied by the caller's credential wrapper.

novel_features.name: Managed OAuth catalog access
novel_features.description: Bootstraps a private OAuth bundle and reuses or refreshes it for bearer-authenticated catalog reads.
